channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: IKEA's new smart home switch with Matter support just leaked –and it looks like my next impulse buy
item.description: A new IKEA smart home switch with Matter support has just leaked –and it should be a versatile dual-button accessory that supports Google Home, Apple HomeKit and Amazon Alexa.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: Satellite Technology to Track Methane Emissions in California - First-of-Its-Kind Project
item.description: California to use satellite technology to track methane and other greenhouse gas emissions, with the first-in-the-nation project costing $100 million from the state budget.
item.dc:creator: Rob Nikolewski, The Mercury News

item.title: The Transformative Power of Digitalization in the Insurance Industry
item.description: The benefits of digital transformation are already palpable in the insurance sector, according to a report by Concentrix.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: A Retired Microsoft Domain Hijacked, Users Urged to Update
item.description: A retired Microsoft domain was hijacked and used in a spam campaign, experts warn. Users are urged to update their systems to prevent further access to impacted domains.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Windows 11’s latest patch declares war on BIOS updates for some Lenovo laptops, blocking them as a security risk in a bizarre turn of events
item.description: Can’t install a BIOS update for your Lenovo laptop? Blame Microsoft’s latest patch for Windows 11 – but fortunately the fix is simple enough.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia-backed CoreWeave slashes IPO size and price amid investor concerns
item.description: CoreWeave plans to reduce the size of its U.S. initial public offering and price its shares below the indicated range, a person familiar with the matter told Reuters on Thursday, dampening expectations that the listing would boost investor appetite for IPOs.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: An AI pioneer is launching a blockchain-powered marketplace for open-source models and applications
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Intro to Alpine.js: A JavaScript framework for minimalists
item.description: I recently backpacked through Big Sur, and after a few days, the inevitable happened: I looked at everything I carried and demanded it justify its presence in my backpack. Making tech choices during the software development process is similar.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative
item.description: The Trump administration has a '10 out, one in' rule for new regulations, but DoD officials are confident they can finalize the CMMC requirements soon. The post DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: How agencies can improve zero trust architecture by addressing their data problem
item.description: Carmelo McCutcheon, the public sector CTO for VAST Data Federal, offers six ways agencies can improve their data protection. The post How agencies can improve zero trust architecture by addressing their data problem first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: 5 big takeaways from Nvidia GTC
item.description: Now that the dust has settled from Nvidia’s GTC 2025, a few industry experts weighed in on some core big picture developments from the conference.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets, although passengers will have to wait until next year until they can take a driverless ride around the nation's capital city.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: Coverage of Nvidia GTC 2025 With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Radical new tech brings flying cars closer to reality
item.description: With six cyclorotors, the BlackBird from CycloTech is designed to take off and land vertically, move sideways, brake mid-air and even parallel park.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
